verdict_reason: The implication asks the engineer to 'audit the last three cycles you optimised through. Name the bhoga-aiśvarya-gati each cycle produced — the promo, the launch, the headline number — and check whether your sense of real engineering work has narrowed to that loop.' Reproducible: the engineer can compare their Datadog query history then-vs-now, their PR review queue, their weekend reading. The diagnostic — definitional narrowing of 'real engineering work' — is checkable against artifacts. The counter-example carves out runway-critical situations. Reproducible in real practice, not pure metaphor. PASS.
